Internal Compliance Memo: PIPL/CSL/DSL status for Guangyuan Prism Robotics Holdings Co., Ltd. (issuer candidate) — CN.
Registration details: USCC (placeholder) 9Z9Z9Z9Z9Z9Z9Z9Z9; registered in Nanshan, Shenzhen; A‑share STAR Market candidate; all offering milestones already filed and publicly disclosed via CSRC.
Scope covers employment onboarding workflows, vendor DPA schedules, investor relations data, and data localisation controls.
Onboarding forms include fields labelled “Resident ID No.”, “Emergency Contact”, and “Bank Account”, but operational records use masked placeholders (e.g., 11000019990101XXXX; 6214 **** **** 0000); no data from minors under 14 collected.
Schedule 2 (China PIPL Addendum) appended to all DPAs; processing purposes narrowed to HR administration, with retention markers applied (e.g., R-6Y for recruiting, R-15Y for personnel files).
Cross-border transfer status: SCC (2024) executed for HR contact list to group hub; CAC filing confirmation received (Ref: YQ-2024-FAKE-0159); no production transfers beyond the approved scope.
Consent governance is policy-only at this stage; the withdrawal mechanism was tested and no active withdrawals are pending or unresolved.
One DSAR was completed on 2026-05-20; requestor received access log and non-required interview notes were erased per schedule, with audit evidence retained.
Data minimisation enforced in HRIS; “Resident ID” and “Household Registration” fields are suppressed for interns; bank account entry is limited to last four digits for verification.
Data localisation remains the default; offshore analytics features are disabled; vendor Azurepine Cloud (Foshan) Technology Co., Ltd. processes only within PRC regions.
Important Data under the DSL not identified in current workflows; personal information is classified as ordinary PI, not sensitive PI, except for masked resident-ID copies stored in sealed archive.
MNPI reminder: internal HR project notes do not contain inside information; references to “listing timetable” mirror CSRC announcements and do not include undisclosed financial metrics.
Sample generic labels in use: “USCC (if vendor): XXXXX-XXXXXXXX-XXXX”, “Employee ID: E-00-0000”, “Passport No.: P0000000 (placeholder)”, “Account Name: HR Payroll (generic)”.
Queries to the Compliance Service Desk via the internal portal or role mailbox privacy@guangyuan-prism.example; do not transmit resident ID images by email.
Board acknowledgment: current controls are implemented; no further CAC filings are required this quarter, and this memo does not contain price-sensitive information.
